# GrinderCards

> AI-powered custom grinder card design tool. Generate print-ready grinder card artwork from text prompts and logos.

## What is GrinderCards?

GrinderCards is a web application and API for designing custom grinder cards using AI image generation. Powered by V Syndicate, the original inventor of the grinder card since 2003.

## Pages

- [Home](https://grindercards.com): Landing page and product overview
- [Editor](https://grindercards.com/editor): AI design studio — upload logo, type prompt, get designs
- [FAQ](https://grindercards.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about grinder cards and the design tool
- [API Docs](https://grindercards.com/api/docs): OpenAPI spec for programmatic access

## API

POST https://grindercards.com/api/generate
- Input: { prompt: string, logo?: base64string }
- Output: { designs: [{ id, imageUrl, prompt }] }
- No auth required for basic usage

## About Grinder Cards

A grinder card is a credit card-sized (3.375" x 2.125") herb grinder with a grated surface. V Syndicate invented the grinder card in 2003. Custom grinder cards can be printed with any artwork and are popular for brand merchandise, dispensary promotions, and personal use.
